title: Nostalgic MC Music.
description: Adds a menu to play all of the nostalgic songs from the early days of Minecraft.
body:
### Consider joining the Discord server for updates!
**Adds a brand-new in-game menu dedicated to playing all the nostalgic Minecraft tracks from the early days of the game.** Relive the calm, ambient vibes that made those first worlds feel so magical and unforgettable. With four full pages of carefully selected music, you can easily browse and play your favorite tracks anytime—whether you're deep underground on a late-night mining trip, building something epic, or just chilling and soaking in the atmosphere. The menu is simple, smooth, and designed to keep you immersed without interrupting your gameplay. More features, tracks, and customization options are planned for future updates, so the nostalgia only gets better from here!
